name: Food Security Crew
description: Food banks, community fridges, meal deliveries, and grocery runs for neighbors who need them.

name: Housing & Shelter Squad
description: Shelter support, tenant advocacy, supply drives, and outreach for unhoused neighbors.

name: Green Streets Team
tagline: Keep our blocks green and clean
description: Park cleanups, tree planting, community gardens, and neighborhood beautification.

name: Education & Youth Circle
tagline: Every kid gets a fair shot
description: Tutoring, mentorship, after-school programs, and school supply drives.

name: Elder Care Collective
description: Friendly visits, tech help, meal companionship, and errands for older neighbors.

name: Animal Allies
description: Shelter volunteering, foster networks, adoption events, and pet food drives.
